leadText: Wicked Torque (Japanese: ダークアクセル Dark Accel) is a damage-dealing Dark-type move introduced in Generation IX. It is the signature move of the Segin Starmobile.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Wicked Torque inflicts damage and has a 10% chance of putting the target to sleep . Encore , Instruct , Mimic , and Sketch fail if the target's last used move was Wicked Torque. Copycat fails if the last used move was Wicked Torque.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V ---
